name: node-unicode-property-aliases-ecmascript
title: node-unicode-property-aliases-ecmascript
summary: Unicode property aliases mapping for property names in Node.js
description:
Unicode property aliases mapping for property names in Node.js
This modules provides unicode 10.0 property alias mappings in JavaScript
format for property names that are supported in ECMAScript RegExp property
escapes.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
